channel.title: Sashank Silwal's Blog
channel.description: Blog posts on machine learning, computer science, and software engineering by Sashank Silwal.

item.title: Getting Started with Claude Code: Everything I Wish I Knew on Day One
item.description: A beginner's guide to Claude Code covering CLAUDE.md, context management, key commands, and the feedback loop that makes it actually useful.

item.title: Claude Code Beyond the Basics: Agents, Context Engineering, and Production Workflows
item.description: An intermediate guide to Claude Code covering context management, CLAUDE.md patterns, subagents, custom commands, hooks, MCP, skills, and CI integration.

item.title: Context Poisoning: How Attackers Manipulate LLM Context Windows
item.description: Prompt injection, data poisoning in RAG systems, and adversarial inputs that hijack LLM behavior. Real attack vectors and practical defenses for production systems.

item.title: Building a RAG System from Scratch
item.description: A step-by-step guide to building retrieval-augmented generation with Python. Embeddings, vector search, and generation, no frameworks required.

item.title: What is Fine-Tuning, and Why Does Every AI Company Do It?
item.description: RLHF, LoRA, full fine-tuning explained without the jargon. How companies take a base model and turn it into something actually useful.

item.title: Fitting Big Models on Small GPUs
item.description: Quantization techniques (GPTQ, GGUF, AWQ), distillation as a size reduction strategy, and practical tradeoffs for running 70B models on consumer hardware.

item.title: Model Distillation: The Technique, The Controversy, and How To Do It
item.description: What model distillation is, how DeepSeek allegedly used it on frontier model outputs, and a practical guide with lessons from our reasoning distillation paper.

item.title: Automated Rule Generation for Fraud Detection Using Deep Learning and Explainability
item.description: Surveying the landscape of approaches to automatically extract interpretable, auditable fraud detection rules from LSTM models using SHAP, Anchors, knowledge distillation, and temporal pattern mining.

item.title: UrbanTherm: GPU-Accelerated Surface Energy Balance for Urban Microclimate Modeling
item.description: How we extended SOLWEIG with a full surface energy balance solver, Newton-Raphson surface temperatures, multi-layer conduction, canopy transpiration, and spatial air temperature, all running on GPU at 1m resolution.

item.title: Industry-Level RAG Practices: A Comprehensive Reference
item.description: A detailed guide covering the full RAG pipeline: chunking, embeddings, vector databases, retrieval strategies, reranking, advanced architectures (CRAG, Self-RAG, Graph RAG, RAPTOR), evaluation, and production deployment.
